text: Stepping through the glass doors, I feel a mixture of anticipation and curiosity, my mind alert to the symmetry and order of this modern space. The second scene, with its vibrant "R + D" display, fills me with a sense of wonder and excitement. The intersection of research and design here stirs thoughts about human innovation and our drive to understand, to collect, to display knowledge. I feel like an explorer in a landscape devoted not to nature, but to ideas—invited to contemplate the artifacts and explanations arrayed before me, each a quiet testament to our restless intellect.
